offer: For restaurant back-office teams processing 10-20 payrolls/month, manual reconciliation causes payroll inaccuracies. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate payroll due to manual reconciliation of timesheets and sales data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant payroll help
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to restaurant back-office teams with demo
Community forums sharing payroll management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of timesheets on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
